debug_info.goal:
X Y Z : Type u
inst✝² : DiffeologicalSpace X
inst✝¹ : DiffeologicalSpace Y
inst✝ : DiffeologicalSpace Z
n m k : ℕ
hX : IsOrbifold n X
hY : IsOrbifold m Y
hZ : IsOrbifold k Z
x✝² : X × Y
x : X
y : Y
x✝¹ : TopologicalSpace X := DTop
x✝ : TopologicalSpace Y := DTop
u : Set X
hu : IsOpen u
hxu : x ∈ u
Γ : ↑{Γ | Finite ↥Γ}
u' : Set (MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient (↥↑Γ) (Eucl n))
hu' : IsOpen u'
du : ↑u ᵈ≃ ↑u'
v : Set Y
hv : IsOpen v
hyv : y ∈ v
Γ' : ↑{Γ | Finite ↥Γ}
v' : Set (MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient (↥↑Γ') (Eucl m))
hv' : IsOpen v'
dv : ↑v ᵈ≃ ↑v'
this : LocallyCompactSpace X
⊢ ∃ i v_1, IsOpen v_1 ∧ Nonempty (↑(u ×ˢ v) ᵈ≃ ↑v_1)

failed_attempts: exact locally_modelled_prod n m hu' hv' du dv
exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', u' ×ˢ v', hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩
exact ⟨_, _, hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩
exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', u' ×ˢ v', hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

let e := diffeoQuotientProd n m Γ Γ'
    exact ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'), e.isOpenMap (hu'.prod hv'),
      ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (e.imageRestrict (u' ×ˢ v'))⟩⟩
exact locallyModelled_prod_chart hu' ⟨du⟩ hv' ⟨dv⟩

let e := (orbitRel_prod_diffeo n m Γ Γ').symm
    refine ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'),
      e.isOpen_image (by rw [dTop_prod_eq_prod_dTop_of_locallyCompact_left]; exact hu'.prod hv'; infer_instance),
      ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (e.image_restriction _)⟩⟩
⟨du.prod dv ≪≫ (IsOrbifold.quotientProd n m Γ Γ').symm.restrict (u' ×ˢ v')⟩⟩
exact LocallyModelled.prod hu' hv' du dv

let e := model_prod_diffeo n m Γ Γ'
    refine ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, e.symm '' (u' ×ˢ v'),
      e.symm.isOpen_image.mpr (hu'.prod hv'), ⟨(du.prod dv).trans e.symm.image_equiv⟩⟩
exact ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, u' ×ˢ v', hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

let Φ := orbitQuotientProdEucl n m Γ Γ'
    refine ⟨Γ × Γ', Φ.symm ⁻¹' (u' ×ˢ v'), (hu'.prod hv').preimage Φ.symm.continuous,
      ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (Φ.symm.restr (u' ×ˢ v'))⟩⟩
exact ⟨⟨↥Γ × ↥Γ', inferInstance⟩, _, (hu'.prod hv').model_prod n m, ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (Diffeomorph.model_prod n m Γ Γ')⟩⟩

let i : {Γ // Finite Γ} := ⟨↑Γ × ↑Γ', inferInstance⟩
    let e := Diffeomorph.quotientProd n m Γ Γ'
    exact ⟨i, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'), e.isOpenMap _ (hu'.prod hv'), ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (e.restrict _)⟩⟩
exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', u' ×ˢ v', hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

let e := Diffeomorph.quotientEuclSum n m ↥Γ ↥Γ'
    refine ⟨⟨↥Γ × ↥Γ', inferInstance⟩, e.symm '' (u' ×ˢ v'), (hu'.prod hv').preimage e.symm.continuous,
      ⟨(Diffeomorph.set_prod u v).trans ((du.prod dv).trans ((Diffeomorph.set_prod u' v').symm.trans
      (e.symm.set_restriction (u' ×ˢ v'))))⟩⟩
exact IsOrbifold.locally_modelled_prod du dv hu' hv'

let e := (orbitRel.diffeoQuotientProd Γ.1 Γ'.1 n m).symm
    exact ⟨⟨_, inferInstance⟩, _, e.isOpenMap _ (hu'.prod hv'), ⟨(du.prod dv).trans e.subtype_image⟩⟩
exact ⟨_, _, hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

let e := orbifold_model_iso n m Γ Γ'
    refine ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'), e.isOpen_image.mpr (hu'.prod hv'),
      ⟨(Diffeomorph.subtypeProd u v).trans ((du.prod dv).trans (Diffeomorph.image e (u' ×ˢ v')))⟩⟩
exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', u' ×ˢ v', hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

let e := quotientProdEucl n m Γ Γ'
    exact ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'), e.isOpenMap (hu'.prod hv'),
      ⟨(Set.prodDiffeomorph u v).trans ((du.prod dv).trans ((Set.prodDiffeomorph u' v').symm.trans (e.restrict _)))⟩⟩

let i := ⟨↑Γ × ↑Γ', inferInstance⟩
    let e := (diffeoQuotientProd n m Γ Γ').symm
    refine ⟨i, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'), e.isOpenMap _ (hu'.prod hv'), ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (e.image_restriction _)⟩⟩
exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', _, (hu'.prod hv').preimage (Diffeo.orbitRelQuotientProd n m Γ Γ').continuous, ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (Diffeo.orbitRelQuotientProd n m Γ Γ').symm⟩⟩
exact ⟨_, _, hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

refine ⟨⟨Γ × Γ', inferInstance⟩, (orbQuotProd n m Γ Γ') '' (u' ×ˢ v'),
      (orbQuotProd n m Γ Γ').isOpen_image.mpr (hu'.prod hv'),
      ⟨(du.prod dv).trans ((orbQuotProd n m Γ Γ').restriction (u' ×ˢ v'))⟩⟩

refine ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, _, (diffeoModelProd n m Γ.1 Γ'.1).isOpen_image.mpr (hu'.prod hv'), 
      ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (Diffeo.setCongr (diffeoModelProd n m Γ.1 Γ'.1) (u' ×ˢ v'))⟩⟩
exact IsOrbifold.locally_modelled_prod n m hu' hv' ⟨du⟩ ⟨dv⟩

exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', _, (quotient_prod_diffeomorph Γ Γ').isOpen_image_iff.mpr (hu'.prod hv'),
      ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (quotient_prod_diffeomorph Γ Γ').toSetDiffeomorph⟩⟩
exact ⟨Γ.prod Γ', _, hu'.prod hv', ⟨du.prod dv⟩⟩

refine ⟨⟨Γ.1 × Γ'.1, inferInstance⟩, Model.prod n m Γ Γ' '' (u' ×ˢ v'), (Model.prod n m Γ Γ').isOpenMap (hu'.prod hv'),
      ⟨(Diffeo.subtypeProd u v).symm.trans ((du.prodCongr dv).trans (Model.prod n m Γ Γ').restr (u' ×ˢ v'))⟩⟩

let e := Eucl.orbitQuotientProd n m Γ Γ'
    exact ⟨i, e '' (u' ×ˢ v'), e.isOpen_image.mpr (hu'.prod hv'), ⟨(du.prod dv).trans (Diffeomorph.image e _)⟩⟩
